usage: create_route_type [-help] [-em_ndr_dist <float>] [-em_ndr_rule <rule_name>] [-min_stack_layer <layer>] -name <string> [-one_side_spacing_range <bottomLayerNum:topLayerNum] [-prefer_multi_cut_via] [-shield_side {one_side both_side}] [-shield_tap_instance_insertion_effort {none standard high}] [-stack_distance <float>] [[[-non_default_rule <ndr_name>] [-shield_net <net_name>] [-bottom_shield_layer <layer>] [-top_preferred_layer <layer>] [-bottom_preferred_layer <layer>] [-preferred_routing_layer_effort {low medium high}]] ] [-mask <mask_number> [-layer_mask_range <bottomLayerNum:topLayerNum>]]

options.name: -em_ndr_dist
options.description: EM ndr rule source to sink distance

options.name: -layer_mask_range
options.description: <bottomLayerNum:topLayerNum> Specify the layer range that the mask constrain should be applied on. For example, 3:4 means that the constrain should be applied on M3 & M4.

options.name: -mask
options.description: mask constraint number in allowed range (0-3)

options.name: -min_stack_layer
options.description: Specify that output pins of the net should use stacked vias from the pin to the given layer in min_stack_layer, and the rest of the connections should start from that given layer. ((layer), optional)

options.name: -one_side_spacing_range
options.description: <bottomLayerNum:topLayerNum Specify the layer range that one side spacing constrain should be applied on.

options.name: -prefer_multi_cut_via
options.description: Specify whether or not to use multi-cut vias for connections at net driver pins

options.name: -preferred_routing_layer_effort
options.description: {low medium high} preferred routing layer effort

options.name: -shield_tap_instance_insertion_effort
options.description: {none standard high} Specifies clock route type for clock shielding, including high frequency(high) and low frequency(standard) that main difference is what ground tie cell instance/via used to achieve shield segments electrical connection.

options.name: -stack_distance
options.description: Specify that the cut distance of cuts on adjacent layers in the stacked vias defined in option min_stack_layer should be less than or equal to the given value.
